mapper.insert: insert into document_links (document_link_id, company_id, source_document_id, target_document_id, link_type, status, created_by, created_at) values (#{documentLinkId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sourceDocumentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{targetDocumentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{linkType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
